body: This PR changes maxiter to 2 for all cases, so that we disentangle the alg prescription from the problem
title: Always use maxiter = 2

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `Krylov` package from `0.8` to `0.8, 0.9`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for Krylov to 0.9, (keep existing compat)
